summary: Screening pass surfaced 24 candidates from discussion sources. Top signals: OpenAI Codex context reduction (329 HN pts), xAI Grok Build SSH key exfiltration, OpenAI Codex instruction encryption blocking audit trails, Anthropic Claude Code limit extension. Strong user_workflow signals around DeepSeek verification loops and silent context compaction causing mid-task memory loss. Infra primitives cover durable workflows, SQLite memory, sandboxing, parallel agent orchestration, and eval tooling. | Anthropic details Claude Code origins and containment; Mistral launches Vibe coding agents; Google releases ADK Go 2.0; Cloudflare detects agentic behavior; Daytona and E2B raise sandbox funding; Fly.io shares agent-building practices; research on agent governance and bugs. | Screening of github-oss sources: major releases from Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Qwen, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cline, Browser Use, E2B; notable infra primitives: trycua/cua, camofox-browser, mitos, kody, mem0; missing user_workflow field reports. | Screening of 46 package sources: 5 mainstream product official packages (OpenAI Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, Vercel agent-eval/detect, HashiCorp Terraform MCP), 30+ infra primitives (MCP servers, eval, memory, sandbox, browser automation, security tools), 0 user workflow reports. No social/discussion sources in this shard.
